response:
## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** Project Dashboard with Color-Only Status Indicators  
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Magnification Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Keyboard Motor, Screen Reader Semantic, Cognitive Neurodivergent  
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Vestibular Motion, Auditory Access  

---

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| CRITICAL | 0 |
| MAJOR | 5 |
| MINOR | 2 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 1 |

---

### Perspectives That Passed  
- None (all escalated perspectives have findings)

---

### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role

**Front-End Dev**  
- **Color-only status indicators** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.1  
- **No ARIA labels for status dots** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.2  
- **Keyboard-only tooltip access missing** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.1.1  
- **Table reflow issues at small viewport** — Magnification Reflow — MAJOR — 1.4.10  
- **Progress bar missing accessible name** — Screen Reader Semantic — MINOR — 1.1.1  

**Content Author**  
- **Status meaning not conveyed in text** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.3.3  
- **Description tooltips only on hover** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 2.1.1  

**UX Design**  
- **Small font size (11px) for dense table** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MINOR — 1.4.8  

**Visual Design**  
- **Progress bar color contrast (1.5:1)** — Environmental Contrast — ENHANCEMENT — 1.4.6  

---

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification  
- Tooltip content accuracy for task descriptions (1.2.1)  
- Reading level of task descriptions (3.1.5)  

---

### Recommended Next Step  
**REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping)

---

## Detailed Findings

```
**Finding:** Status indicators use color only with no text or pattern fallback  
**WCAG:** 1.4.1 Use of Color  
**Perspective:** Environmental Contrast  
**Severity:** MAJOR  
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)  
**Evidence:** STATUS_COLORS object defines colors without text labels; .status-dot has no text or aria-label  
**Fix:** Add text labels ("Blocked", "At Risk") adjacent to status dots and add aria-label to dots

**Finding:** Status dot colors lack programmatic association with task status  
**WCAG:** 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value  
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic  
**Severity:** MAJOR  
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)  
**Evidence:** .status-dot has no aria-label or text content to convey status meaning  
**Fix:** Add aria-label="Status: [status]" to each status dot

**Finding:** Tooltip content only accessible via hover, not keyboard  
**WCAG:** 2.1.1 Keyboard  
**Perspective:** Keyboard Motor  
**Severity:** MAJOR  
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)  
**Evidence:** .desc-trigger::after only appears on hover, no keyboard focus handling  
**Fix:** Add focus-visible styles for .desc-trigger and keyboard event handlers

**Finding:** Table requires horizontal scrolling at 320px viewport  
**WCAG:** 1.4.10 Reflow  
**Perspective:** Magnification Reflow  
**Severity:** MAJOR  
**Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)  
**Evidence:** task-table has fixed column widths; cell-desc has max-width: 160px  
**Fix:** Use relative widths and ensure content reflows to single column at 320px

**Finding:** Progress bar lacks accessible name  
**WCAG:** 1.1.1 Non-text Content  
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic  
**Severity:** MINOR  
**Route to:** Front-End Dev  
**Evidence:** .progress-fill has no aria-label or text alternative  
**Fix:** Add aria-label={`${task.progress}% complete`} to progress-fill

**Finding:** Status meaning not conveyed in text for cognitive accessibility  
**WCAG:** 3.3.3 Error Suggestion  
**Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent  
**Severity:** MAJOR  
**Route to:** Content Author  
**Evidence:** Status is only shown as color dot with no text description in table  
**Fix:** Add text column with status meaning ("Blocked", "At Risk") adjacent to status dot

**Finding:** Tooltip content only accessible via hover  
**WCAG:** 2.1.1 Keyboard  
**Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent  
**Severity:** MAJOR  
**Route to:** Front-End Dev  
**Evidence:** .desc-trigger::after only appears on hover, no keyboard access  
**Fix:** Add focus styles and keyboard event handlers for tooltip visibility

**Finding:** Font size (11px) may be difficult to read  
**WCAG:** 1.4.8 Visual Presentation  
**Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent  
**Severity:** MINOR  
**Route to:** Visual Design  
**Evidence:** task-table has font-size: 11px  
**Fix:** Increase to 14px or use relative units for better readability

**Finding:** Progress bar color contrast (1.5:1) falls short of AAA  
**WCAG:** 1.4.6 Contrast (Enhanced)  
**Perspective:** Environmental Contrast  
**Severity:** ENHANCEMENT  
**Route to:** Visual Design  
**Evidence:** .progress-fill has #1565c0 on #e0e0e0 (4.5:1 AA)  
**Fix:** Increase contrast to 7:1 for AAA compliance
```

---

```
### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: color-only-status-indicators
fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f8c9b2d6e

wcag_or_apg: 1.4.1 Use of Color
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(a)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: magnification_reflow=MEDIUM, environmental_contrast=HIGH, keyboard_motor=MEDIUM, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH
evidence: STATUS_COLORS object defines colors without text labels; .status-dot has no text or aria-label
reproduction_steps: Inspect table rows in dev tools; check status column
expected_behavior: Status should be conveyed through color + text + ARIA
actual_behavior: Status is only shown as color dot with no text or ARIA
trend: new
```

```
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(j)

evidence: .progress-fill has no aria-label or text alternative
reproduction_steps: Inspect progress bar elements in dev tools
expected_behavior: Progress bar should have accessible name
actual_behavior: Progress bar has no aria-label or text alternative
trend: new
```
